intent: Add a local serve mode with a chat panel that lets authors edit topology via natural language, powered by Claude Code CLI

changed.summary: Now dispatches a `serve` command in addition to review and init
changed.before: Only had review and init commands

decision_trace.decision: Shell out to Claude Code CLI rather than calling Anthropic API directly
alternatives: Built-in rule engine for common edits
decision_trace.rationale: No API key configuration needed — uses whatever auth the user already has set up. Keeps differ AI-provider-agnostic at the boundary.

decision_trace.decision: Preview + confirm workflow rather than immediate application
decision_trace.rationale: User explicitly requested safety — see the change before it lands. Prevents AI mistakes from silently corrupting topology.

decision_trace.decision: SSE for live reload rather than WebSocket
alternatives: Full page refresh on file watch
decision_trace.rationale: One-way push is all we need (server → client). SSE is simpler, no extra dependencies, works over standard HTTP.

decision_trace.decision: Separate render-serve.ts that wraps the base renderer
alternatives: Add chat UI directly to render.ts with a flag
decision_trace.rationale: Keeps static review HTML unchanged (no chat panel leaking into CI artifacts). Serve mode extends it via string injection.
